summary: W1455 refines the W1454 W987 construction by building its W949 endpoint-localized-unit input from endpoint strict-exact witnesses and the W945 localized-unit provider, then feeding the resulting W1454 input to assemble W950, W984, W717, W716, W730, W986, and W987 with projection theorems back to those endpoint fields, normalized-source field, target fields, relation fields, and boundary fields. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1455 constructs W987 from two raw boundary fields, two raw relation fields, W944 target no-univ data, W973 closed-embedding closedness data, W948 normalized-source-triangulation data, endpoint strict-exact witnesses, and W945 localized-unit data rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1455 raw boundary-field, raw relation-field, W944, W973, W948, endpoint strict-exact, and W945 construction inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
Before any future product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
